pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Batman (TDKR:The Dark Knight Triumphant) 100% and 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy present the Be@rbrick Batman (TDKR:The Dark Knight Triumphant) 100% and 400% Collectible Figure Set!  These figures stand at approximately 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature the Dark Knight himself, ready to fight crime all over Gotham City.  DC Comics fans don't miss your chance to add this Batman Be@rbrick to your collection today!
